mapper.select: SELECT T2.STACK_ID, T2.STACK_CODE, T2.STACK_NAME, T2.POSITION, T2.POSITION_FROM, T1.POSITION_TIME FROM ( SELECT STACK_ID STACK_ID, MAX (POSITION_TIME) POSITION_TIME FROM M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION WHERE DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY STACK_ID ORDER BY STACK_ID ) T1 LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION T2 ON T1.STACK_ID = T2.STACK_ID AND T1.POSITION_TIME = T2.POSITION_TIME

SELECT T2.STACK_ID, T2.STACK_CODE, T2.STACK_NAME, T2.POSITION, T2.POSITION_FROM, T1.POSITION_TIME FROM ( SELECT STACK_ID STACK_ID, MAX (POSITION_TIME) POSITION_TIME FROM M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION WHERE DEL_FLAG = '0' and STACK_ID != #{stackId} GROUP BY STACK_ID ORDER BY STACK_ID ) T1 LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION T2 ON T1.STACK_ID = T2.STACK_ID AND T1.POSITION_TIME = T2.POSITION_TIME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION ( ID, STACK_ID, STACK_CODE, STACK_NAME, POSITION, POSITION_FROM, POSITION_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{stackId}, #{stackCode}, #{stackName}, #{position}, #{positionFrom}, #{positionTime}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT PARAM_VAL FROM SYS_PARAMETER WHERE PARAM_CD = 'NEED_RUNPILE_QUANTITY'

SELECT temp_t1.STOREHOUSE_ID, temp_t1.STOREHOUSE_NAME, temp_t1.REGION_ID, temp_t1.REGION_NAME, temp_t1.MASS_ID, temp_t1.MASS_NAME, temp_t1.TON, temp_t2.STACK_ID, temp_t2.POSITION_TIME, temp_t3.LAST_REFRESH_TIME FROM ( SELECT STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, SUM (TON) TON FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL GROUP BY STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME ) temp_t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT T2.STACK_ID STACK_ID, T2.STACK_CODE STACK_CODE, T2.STACK_NAME STACK_NAME, T2.POSITION POSITION, T2.POSITION_FROM POSITION_FROM, T1.POSITION_TIME POSITION_TIME FROM ( SELECT STACK_ID STACK_ID, MAX (POSITION_TIME) POSITION_TIME FROM M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION WHERE DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY STACK_ID ORDER BY STACK_ID ) T1 LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION T2 ON T1.STACK_ID = T2.STACK_ID AND T1.POSITION_TIME = T2.POSITION_TIME ) temp_t2 ON temp_t1.MASS_ID = temp_t2.STACK_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, "MAX" (CREATE_TIME) LAST_REFRESH_TIME FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL GROUP BY STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME ) temp_t3 ON temp_t1.MASS_ID = temp_t3.MASS_ID
AND temp_t1.MASS_ID = #{massId}
